title: New York
writer: Forrest Halsey, Becky Gardiner, Barbara Chambers
actors: Ricardo Cortez, Lois Wilson, Estelle Taylor
plot: The Ritz Social Club, a Bowery cabaret, is the rendezvous of four old friends: Michael Angelo Cassidy, a trap drummer and composer; Buck, his arranger; Izzy, who breaks into politics; and Trent, who has become a gun-carrying gangs...
